blocks.text: Perfect. Now let me run DESeq2 in R:

input.code:
# Load required libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)

# Read counts and metadata
W <- Sys.getenv('WORK_DIR')
counts_file <- file.path(W, 'counts_de.csv')
metadata_file <- file.path(W, 'metadata_de.csv')

counts <- read.csv(counts_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv(metadata_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

# Ensure gene names match between counts rows and metadata rows match counts columns
message(sprintf("Counts: %d genes × %d cells", nrow(counts), ncol(counts)))
message(sprintf("Metadata: %d samples", nrow(metadata)))

# Convert counts to integer matrix (required for DESeq2)
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
storage.mode(counts) <- "integer"

# Ensure metadata rows match counts columns
metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop = FALSE]

# Check metadata
message("\nMetadata:")
print(table(metadata$cell_type))
